$bridges_desc.en: Map of bridge name to bridge configuration.
$bridges_desc.zh: 桥接名称到桥接配置的映射。

$server_desc.zh: 远程 MQTT 代理地址 (host:port)。

$proto_ver_desc.zh: MQTT 协议版本 (v3, v4, v5)。

$clientid_prefix_desc.en: Prefix for auto-generated MQTT client IDs.
$clientid_prefix_desc.zh: 自动生成 MQTT 客户端 ID 的前缀。

$keepalive_desc.en: MQTT keep alive interval in seconds.

$pool_size_desc.en: Number of MQTT connections to the remote broker.
$pool_size_desc.zh: 到远程代理的 MQTT 连接数。

$buffer_pool_size_desc.en: Number of disk queue buffer workers per bridge. Messages are distributed across buffers by topic hash. Changing this value triggers a plugin restart; see the README for important caveats.
$buffer_pool_size_desc.zh: 每个桥接的磁盘队列缓冲工作进程数。消息按主题哈希分布到缓冲区。更改此值会触发插件重启，请参阅 README 了解重要注意事项。

$filter_topic_desc.en: Local topic filter pattern (supports + and # wildcards).
$filter_topic_desc.zh: 本地主题过滤模式（支持 + 和 # 通配符）。

$remote_topic_desc.en: Target topic template. Use ${topic} for the original topic.
$remote_topic_desc.zh: 目标主题模板。使用 ${topic} 代替原始主题。

$enqueue_timeout_ms_desc.en: Max time in milliseconds to block the publish path waiting for disk queue confirmation. Only applies to QoS > 0 messages; QoS 0 messages are always enqueued asynchronously.
$enqueue_timeout_ms_desc.zh: 等待磁盘队列确认时阻塞发布路径的最大时间（毫秒）。仅适用于 QoS > 0 的消息；QoS 0 的消息始终异步入队。

$max_inflight_desc.en: Maximum number of unacknowledged messages the connector sends to the remote broker at once. Controls both the batch size popped from the disk queue and the emqtt client's send window. Higher values improve throughput; lower values reduce memory usage under backpressure.
$max_inflight_desc.zh: 连接器一次向远程代理发送的最大未确认消息数。同时控制从磁盘队列弹出的批量大小和 emqtt 客户端的发送窗口。较高的值可提高吞吐量，较低的值可减少背压下的内存使用。

$remote_qos_desc.en: QoS level for publishing to the remote broker.
$remote_qos_desc.zh: 发布到远程代理的 QoS 级别。

$remote_retain_desc.en: Retain flag for publishing to the remote broker.
$remote_retain_desc.zh: 发布到远程代理的保留标志。

$ssl_sni_desc.en: TLS Server Name Indication. Defaults to the server hostname. Set to "disable" to turn off SNI.
$ssl_sni_desc.zh: TLS 服务器名称指示。默认使用服务器主机名。设为 "disable" 可关闭 SNI。

$queue_dir_desc.en: Directory for disk queue segment files.

$queue_seg_bytes_desc.zh: 每个段文件的最大大小（例如 100MB）。

$queue_max_total_bytes_desc.zh: 磁盘队列最大总大小（例如 1GB）。
